text.p: I couldnt find the mail which contains your account number you said you sent me. I will so much be happier if you "resend" it.
I have not received your a/c number as promised. What is happening up there? too busy?
I have given Dr the guideline you sent to me. He will surely use it to benefit.
How is everyone over there and at home?

You said something about a way to get up there. Could you please elucidate? I am eager to get something done. I missed the last promotion to Readership for one international paper short. I don't want it to repeat itself.
Send me the list of journals you promised.
Hope to here from you soon.
Merry Xmas and Happy New Year.
